title: NeoBuyerLite
description: Unique Free Buyer with Coin Upgrades and Boosters
body:
![Possibilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dc88cc51a6df803129d4c7ef37120c45b0358ea.png)


Dependies:
Vault

Flexible setup:
- Ability to customize items for delivery to the buyer
- Ability to add/subtract items for delivery to the buyer
- Ability to customize each item: price, description, name and so on

Buyer upgrade:
There are a total of 5 customizable buyer level levels
It is possible to change for them:
- The coin multiplier itself for the level of pumping
- Permission for issuance

Commands:

/buyer | seller - to open the buyer's menu
/neobuyerlite help - Help with plugin commands
/neobuyerlite reload - Reload the plugin
/neobuyerlite info - Information about upgrading the Buyer

Permissions:

neobuyerlite.use - Permission to use the Buyer
neobuyerlite.admin - Permission for using the plugin admin commands
